---
title: "東都1部"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
LEAGUE <- "東都1部"
```

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=../explore.html#league-browser">

::: {.minimal-hero}
<div class="minimal-kicker">LEAGUE</div>
<h1 class="minimal-title">`r LEAGUE`</h1>
<div class="hero-meta-strip">
  <span>MOVED TO EXPLORE</span>
</div>
:::

<div class="section-actions">
  <a href="../explore.html#league-browser" class="directory-link">リーグ一覧へ移動</a>
</div>
